visa_types.name: Visiting Relatives And Friends Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden on Visiting Family and Friends, you need the documents as per below checklist.

Checklist for Visiting Family & Friends (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4dz6WsYlsOcGiZCezBfSv8/1454e5d0f3961f5271de6d39fb35b456/sweden-visiting-family-and-friends-checklist-jun-2022.pdf)
Checklist for Minor (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2YZDChK5NSYIyHfw4XePQW/d8aa8246d9b58827ebc30a0361ff0993/Latest-Checklist-for-Minor.pdf)
Invitation Form (https://www.vfsglobal.comhttps://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6Z7eZtKJamqINuX2yU4fYG/743ffb8cef53acda2f4a0fef27047b17/New-Invitation-Form.pdf/one-pager/sweden/india/english/pdf/New-Invitation-Form.pdf)
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Visa Application form to be completed and signed and dated by the applicant (in cases of minors, the application form shall be signed by a person both parents or temporary parental authority or legal guardianship
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in English
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in Swedish
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
Travel Medical Insurance
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Visiting Relatives And Friends Visa]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Swedish Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 19 Euros (Inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
Optional Services-
- SMS - EUR 4
- Courier - EUR 7
- Call Back Service - EUR 7
- Hold At VAC (Hub city passport collection) - EUR 8.5
- Courier after submission - EUR 7
(Description- If you had not opted for the Courier service on the day of your application submission, you could still choose this service after the submission. Simply send an email to our Customer Care team at vasinfo@vfshelpline.com (mailto:vasinfo@vfshelpline.com) and pay the required fees online.)
Note: Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS service charges will be applicable.
visa_types.processing_time: The Processing time is 15 calendar days from the day the application reach to Embassy New Delhi. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will take another two days due to postal delivery.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen Visa
Visiting Relatives and Friends Visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visit to you friends or family members, residing in Sweden. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Schengen Visa
Visiting Relatives and Friends Visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visit to you friends or family members, residing in Sweden. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Visiting Relatives And Friends Visa]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Swedish Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 19 Euros (Inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
Optional Services-
- SMS - EUR 4
- Courier - EUR 7
- Call Back Service - EUR 7
- Hold At VAC (Hub city passport collection) - EUR 8.5
- Courier after submission - EUR 7
(Description- If you had not opted for the Courier service on the day of your application submission, you could still choose this service after the submission. Simply send an email to our Customer Care team at vasinfo@vfshelpline.com (mailto:vasinfo@vfshelpline.com) and pay the required fees online.)
Note: Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS service charges will be applicable.

## Documents Required
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden on Visiting Family and Friends, you need the documents as per below checklist.

Checklist for Visiting Family & Friends (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4dz6WsYlsOcGiZCezBfSv8/1454e5d0f3961f5271de6d39fb35b456/sweden-visiting-family-and-friends-checklist-jun-2022.pdf)
Checklist for Minor (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2YZDChK5NSYIyHfw4XePQW/d8aa8246d9b58827ebc30a0361ff0993/Latest-Checklist-for-Minor.pdf)
Invitation Form (https://www.vfsglobal.comhttps://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6Z7eZtKJamqINuX2yU4fYG/743ffb8cef53acda2f4a0fef27047b17/New-Invitation-Form.pdf/one-pager/sweden/india/english/pdf/New-Invitation-Form.pdf)
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Visa Application form to be completed and signed and dated by the applicant (in cases of minors, the application form shall be signed by a person both parents or temporary parental authority or legal guardianship
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in English
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in Swedish
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
Travel Medical Insurance

## Photo Specifications
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2cMdqBZvURYSNB2SOEGGsT/abdd300c608db8e45edbadefa370751f/Photo-Specifications.pdf) for more Information

## Processing Time
The Processing time is 15 calendar days from the day the application reach to Embassy New Delhi. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will take another two days due to postal delivery.

## Download Form
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4IqUMib9dddSVq6dSmMO8b/c24f46e09e5dc31c9fcda09bf702f8b8/schengen-visa-form.pdf)
Sweden Sample Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2D8hm1a4CgnFEePYpLit2O/46be983796c41f4e996a30c8ed726ef0/sweden-sample-application-form.pdf) 
Invitation Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6Z7eZtKJamqINuX2yU4fYG/743ffb8cef53acda2f4a0fef27047b17/New-Invitation-Form.pdf)
Data Protection Notice (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6ioeGMhtS9Mh14wcM0Jok9/226aea8bebe90acd646c541aaedd0b96/Data-Protection-Notice-New.pdf)
Medical Insurance Declaration Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2gGZtDK231383utgEG5Zso/eb0d2a173f1b9cb8ec9f2d4b2862f97a/Medical_Travel_Insurance.pdf)
Mandatory Consent Form for Minors (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2bfQNbZokR5sx1xcQSyDX4/c35160f4a96f3140a5835485120cd66a/ConsentLetter_091015.pdf)
Power of Attorney (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2ThH2achoiptiCYrIjX4mb/187bb26df33524a262a646263343c2fe/power-of-attorney-new.pdf)

visa_types.name: EU - Regulation
visa_types.overview:
- Application can be submitted six (06) months prior to the date of departure and for seafarers can be submitted nine (09) months prior to the date of departure.
- From May 1, 2010 only passports issued within the previous
                                                            ten (10) years will be accepted.
- Passport must have at least two blank pages.
- Passport should be valid for at least three (3) months
                                                            longer than the intended stay.
The list of Schengen countries are as follows:
                                                    

[Table:EU - Regulation ]

[swe > ind > en > map]
visa_types.full_text:
- Application can be submitted six (06) months prior to the date of departure and for seafarers can be submitted nine (09) months prior to the date of departure.

                                                            ten (10) years will be accepted.
- Passport must have at least two blank pages.
- Passport should be valid for at least three (3) months
                                                            longer than the intended stay.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen Visa
Tourist visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for tourism purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Schengen Visa
Tourist visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for tourism purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Tourist Visa ]
he above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Swedish Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 19 Euros (Inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
Optional Services-
- SMS - EUR 4
- Courier - EUR 7
- Call Back Service - EUR 7
- Hold At VAC (Hub city passport collection) - EUR 8.5
- Courier after submission - EUR 7
(Description- If you had not opted for the Courier service on the day of your application submission, you could still choose this service after the submission. Simply send an email to our Customer Care team at vasinfo@vfshelpline.com (mailto:vasinfo@vfshelpline.com) and pay the required fees online.)
Note: Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS service charges will be applicable.

## Documents Required
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden on Tourist, you need the documents as per below checklist.

Checklist for Tourist Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4XfU6mNN7gDSSx596LNOoQ/fb2031e683218bda7604e1b7917ea9aa/sweden-tourist-checklist-jun-2022.pdf) 
Checklist for Minor (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2YZDChK5NSYIyHfw4XePQW/d8aa8246d9b58827ebc30a0361ff0993/Latest-Checklist-for-Minor.pdf)
Checklist for Tourist Group Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/cg5GXgUisxCJiltYdguVI/a90bbb277264b28d13329dae7bc68705/sweden-tourist-checklist-groups.pdf)
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Visa Application form to be completed and signed and dated by the applicant (in cases of minors, the application form shall be signed by a person both parents or temporary parental authority or legal guardianship
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in English
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in Swedish
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
Travel Medical Insurance
Each applicant (including children) must have a travel medical insurance. The list of Schengen approved Travel medical insurance companies (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/sweden/india/english/pdf/approved-TMI-companies-list-2026.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2cMdqBZvURYSNB2SOEGGsT/abdd300c608db8e45edbadefa370751f/Photo-Specifications.pdf) for more Information

## Processing Time
The Processing time is 15 calendar days from the day the application reach to Embassy New Delhi. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will take another two days due to postal delivery.

## Download Form
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4IqUMib9dddSVq6dSmMO8b/c24f46e09e5dc31c9fcda09bf702f8b8/schengen-visa-form.pdf)
Data Protection Notice (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6ioeGMhtS9Mh14wcM0Jok9/226aea8bebe90acd646c541aaedd0b96/Data-Protection-Notice-New.pdf)
Medical Insurance Declaration Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2gGZtDK231383utgEG5Zso/eb0d2a173f1b9cb8ec9f2d4b2862f97a/Medical_Travel_Insurance.pdf)
Mandatory Consent Form for Minors (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2bfQNbZokR5sx1xcQSyDX4/c35160f4a96f3140a5835485120cd66a/ConsentLetter_091015.pdf)
Power of Attorney (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2ThH2achoiptiCYrIjX4mb/187bb26df33524a262a646263343c2fe/power-of-attorney-new.pdf)

To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Visa Application form to be completed and signed and dated by the applicant (in cases of minors, the application form shall be signed by a person both parents or temporary parental authority or legal guardianship
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in English
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in Swedish
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
Travel Medical Insurance
Each applicant (including children) must have a travel medical insurance. The list of Schengen approved Travel medical insurance companies (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/sweden/india/english/pdf/approved-TMI-companies-list-2026.pdf)

## Processing Time
The Processing time is 15 calendar days from the day the application reach to Embassy New Delhi. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will take another two days due to postal delivery.
